instructions.email: Copy the generated email templates from output/outreach/emails_[CITY].json and send manually via your email provider (Gmail, Outlook, etc.)
instructions.sms: Copy SMS templates and send via your SMS provider (Twilio, etc.)

sample_email.subject: Quick fix for your website - more emergency calls
sample_email.body:
Hi [First Name],

I noticed your site at [WEBSITE] could be losing emergency plumbing calls.

I rebuilt your homepage to show exactly what I mean:
[DEMO LINK]

Here's what I fixed:
- Added a sticky 'Call Now' button
- Made your phone number prominent on every page
- Created a sense of urgency for emergency services

Would you like me to walk you through the changes? It's completely free to look at.

Best,
Alex

sample_sms: Quick fix for your website—this could bring more emergency calls: [LINK]
